info.title: Appx Agent Server
info.description: Pi-SDK-based agent orchestration. Shared auth/model state with explicit, persisted project-scoped session runtimes.

ThinkingLevel.description:
Thinking/reasoning level for models that support it.
Note: "xhigh" is only supported by selected model families. Use model thinking-level metadata
from

channels.description: Map of SSE channel name → current subscriber count.

id.description: Immutable slug; registry key, route param, and directory name.

name.description: Human-facing project name. Slugified into the immutable id and directory name.

firstMessage.description: First user message; empty for never-prompted sessions.

messages.description: Pi-shaped message objects (role + content array). Opaque here.

requests.description: Pending extension UI request events. Shape follows Pi RPC extension_ui_request events.

WireEvent.description: Every JSON event agent-server forwards on `GET …/sessions/{id}/events`.

event.description: The pi lifecycle event during which the error occurred (e.g. "session_start").

ExtensionErrorEvent.description: Emitted when a pi extension handler throws; surfaced to the UI for visibility.

AgentMessage.description:
AgentMessage: Union of LLM messages + custom messages.
This abstraction allows apps to add custom message types while maintaining
type safety and compatibility with the base LLM messages.

redacted.description:
When true, the thinking content was redacted by safety filters. The opaque
encrypted payload is stored in `thinkingSignature` so it can be passed back
to the API for multi-turn continuity.

Recordstringany.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Recordstringunknown.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

AssistantMessageEvent.description:
Event protocol for AssistantMessageEventStream.

Streams should emit `start` before partial updates, then terminate with either:
- `done` carrying the final successful AssistantMessage, or
- `error` carrying the final AssistantMessage with stopReason "error" or "aborted"
  and errorMessage.

details.description: Extension-specific data (e.g., ArtifactIndex, version markers for structured compaction)

CompactionResultunknown.description: Result from compact() - SessionManager adds uuid/parentUuid when saving

get.summary: List models known to this runtime, including unavailable ones for diagnostics.
List non-secret provider auth status for the runtime.

200.description: Known providers and whether each has configured auth.

put.summary: Store an API key for a provider in Pi auth storage.

delete.summary: Remove a stored provider credential from Pi auth storage.

post.summary: Start a Pi subscription OAuth login flow.

200.description: Current flow state. Continue if a prompt or pasted redirect is required.

400.description: Provider does not support subscription auth.

delete.summary: Cancel a pending subscription login flow.

post.summary: Continue a subscription login flow with prompt input or pasted redirect URL.

get.summary: List custom models.json providers without secret values.

put.summary: Create or update a custom Pi provider in models.json.

delete.summary: Remove a custom Pi provider from models.json.

200.description: Custom provider removed if it existed.

post.summary: Create a project, or return the existing one (idempotent on name).

400.description: Name does not yield a valid project id.

delete.summary: Remove a project: evict runtime, drop metadata, delete working dir + transcripts.

get.summary: List sessions (persisted + in-memory not yet flushed).
Return the active model/thinking settings for a session.

patch.summary: Switch model and/or thinking level while a session is idle.

404.description: Unknown session id or model id.

get.summary: Persisted message history for a session.
List pending extension UI requests for a session.

post.summary: Resolve a pending extension UI request.

404.description: Unknown session id or request id.

post.summary: Send a user prompt. Events flow over the SSE stream.
Abort the in-flight run on a session. No-op if idle.

200.description: Abort accepted (or no-op if session was idle).

get.summary: Server-Sent Events stream of pi AgentSessionEvents for the session.
get.description: Long-lived `text/event-stream`. Each `data:` line carries one JSON `AgentSessionEvent` (see the `AgentSessionEvent` schema). Non-JSON lines occur too: an initial `connected to <id>` line and periodic `heartbeat` keepalive events, both of which consumers ignore. The event payload is validated against this contract server-side before being forwarded.

200.description: SSE stream. Each `data:` line is a JSON-encoded AgentSessionEvent.
